reviews.review_description: I love the attention to details in the fact the devs actually knew how to make this game accessible and easy to play. I have a few "table top" games but they all seem to make it difficult to arrange the comfort setting. Grabbing parts of the table, adjusting height calibration through countless menus etc etc. With this experience using a simple one button press for up and one for down couldn't be easier, it feels like walking to a table and sitting down. The environments are simple but effective and match the overall tone of the experience and there's enough variety of games, all done very well, to keep all types happy 😊

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for the thoughtful review — your words truly mean a lot to our team!

We spent a lot of time focusing on comfort, accessibility, and making the experience feel as natural as possible, so hearing that the simple height adjustment and easy setup made a difference really makes us happy 😊
Our goal was exactly what you described — to make it feel like casually walking up to a table and sitting down with friends.

We’re also glad you enjoyed the environments and variety of games! We’ll continue adding more content and refining the experience so all kinds of players can keep having fun together.

Thanks again for being part of the party 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description:
It has been a long-standing aspiration, shared by many, to establish a virtual reality environment where family and friends, regardless of their geographical proximity, can convene to engage in board and card games, and partake in social interaction. This vision has now been realized.

While there are minor areas for refinement, these are not significant impediments. The inclusion of additional card games, such as "Fish" and similar titles, would be highly beneficial for intergenerational play. Furthermore, integrating well-known games, perhaps re-branded as "Property Tycoon" or "Real Estate Rush," could significantly enhance the user experience.

I believe the development team has created a sustainable platform with long-term potential, distinguishing it from other VR titles that have not maintained their longevity.

The team's accomplishments are commendable, and I anticipate the continued evolution of this game with great interest.

3/7/26
Update
Hey Dive XR (Table Party) 

where have you been? 
There have been no updates that I can see and we Still have a Christmas tree in the community room and Easter is almost upon us! 
Are you working on updates? More games? More environments? Or just give up? Please let us know,

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
First of all, thank you for your continued support and for taking the time to share both your thoughtful review and your concerns.

We truly appreciate your kind words about our vision — creating a space where people can connect and enjoy games together across distances means everything to us.

And yes — we’re still here and actively working on updates! 😊
We’ve recently updated the lobby environment, so you should now be able to experience a refreshed space beyond the Christmas theme.

Behind the scenes, we’re also continuing to develop new content, improvements, and upcoming DLCs. Your suggestions about more card games and expanded experiences are very much in line with what we’re planning moving forward.

Thank you again for your patience and for believing in Table Party — we’re committed to growing this into a long-lasting platform.
We’re excited to share more with you soon!

— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_title: Family Game Night in Different States!
reviews.review_description: I was searching FOREVER for something my family could do for game nights since we live in different states. THIS IS IT! This app is AMAZING. It has so many game options. Traditional board games, some niche games, and even some lightly active games to get you off the couch. There is something for everyone young and old. I usually play with my husband, mom, and sister.The welcome lobby is also SO cute. My family loved decorating the Christmas tree together, throwing snowballs, and taking funny pictures. THANK YOU to the creator! We are making so many great family memories because of this game. We love it here!

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for this heartfelt review — it truly means the world to us!

Hearing that Table Party is bringing your family together across different states is exactly why we created this experience. Moments like decorating the Christmas tree, throwing snowballs, and laughing together in the lobby are what make everything worthwhile for us 💛

We’re so happy that you’re making wonderful family memories with your husband, mom, and sister — that’s the kind of connection we hope to create for everyone.

We’ll keep working hard to bring even more fun games and experiences for you and your family to enjoy.
See you again at the (virtual) table! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description: So far I am pleased with this game. I have been looking for adult oriented games, Cards Mainly. But the other games are great, It would be awesome if the devs could work on other card games for multiplayer, Crazy 8's, Euchre, Cribbage, etc no one in the VR space has this cornered yet. and this game seems like a great opportunity to grab it. It has a nice feel and look to it. Its so far is very easy to use and navigate. So refreshing to see realistic vr for older folks to sit back relax and enjoy friends with. Thank for this.

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for the kind words — you truly made my day!

We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the game and really appreciate your thoughtful suggestions. You're absolutely right — the VR space could use more classic card games for adults, and ideas like Crazy 8’s, Euchre, and Cribbage are fantastic. We'll definitely keep these in mind as we expand our game library.

It means a lot to us that you find Table Party comfortable, welcoming, and easy to use — especially for players looking to relax and connect with friends.
Thanks again for being part of the party! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description:
Me and my husband purchased this game a few days ago and have had lots of fun but since yesterday evening we both can't load the app as it's boots us both out! Real shame! I hope this bug gets fixed so we can enjoy it again

Updated review! Thankyou devs for your reply, hope you all have a wonderful Christmas too from me and my husband!

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
We're very sorry for the inconvenience.

As announced in our Discord server and store developer post, we were performing a scheduled server maintenance recently. The maintenance is now complete, so everything should be working again!

We hope you and your husband can now enjoy a joyful Christmas board game session together.
Thanks so much for your patience — and happy holidays! 🎄✨
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description: My family and I are  having so much fun playing the different games. There are several apps we play together, but this is definitely our new favorite. I highly recommend this app.

reviews.review_title: Having a blast playing the game!
reviews.review_description: So many different options of games to choose from. I even had the pleasure of meeting the developer while I was playing!  Can’t say enough great things about her and this game!

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for the kind words — it was such a pleasure meeting you in-game!

We're thrilled to hear you're having a blast exploring all the different games. Moments like these — connecting through play — are exactly what Table Party is all about 💛

Hope to see you again soon at the (virtual) table! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_title: Best board and card games so far💞
reviews.review_description: I love most of the games they have except for games like sushi bar, gardening, chopping wood, things I used to do when I was a kid for work. We need more games where you have pieces you start at start and race others to home. If you land on them your opponent has to restart. Lol!  Different games like Yute. But roll dice or pick cards. Or card games like spades. Love the game one card, gin, yatzy. Can we play ziltch or something like it. I like the slot machine idea but the games are long enough. You play it once and it's over. Thanks for your time.

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for the thoughtful and fun review — your feedback means a lot to us!

We totally get what you mean about wanting more classic “race to home” style board games and strategic card games like Spades or Zilch. We're so happy to hear you’re enjoying One Card, Gin, and Yatzy — and we’ll definitely keep your suggestions in mind as we expand the game lineup!

In the meantime, we hope you check out our newly updated Christmas-themed lobby — it’s full of festive vibes to enjoy with friends and family.
And stay tuned… some magical new DLCs are on the way very soon! 🎄✨

Thanks again for being part of the party — see you at the (virtual) table! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description: Love the game selection. Smooth and easy to navigate. My family and I love it.

Tl;dr
One of underrated games,
Super fun with friends and cheap

Last night I played this game with my friends with no reasons.
We thought it looks fun and we were correct.
One of most important thing that I believe is, you never realize how long you are playing during the session.
This game made us playing hours and hours with my friends.
And then it's cheap. It's one of underrated games.
Try it.

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for the awesome review — it truly means a lot!

We’re so glad you and your friends had such a great time, and we absolutely love that “you didn’t even realize how long you were playing.” That’s the best kind of feedback! ⏳✨

Thanks for calling us one of the underrated gems — we’ll keep working hard to make sure more people discover the fun.
See you again at the (virtual) table! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description:
I took my time writing this review because I wanted to test it thoroughly.

The game catalogue in ‘Table Party’ currently contains 20 games (including three paid DLCs) and offers a good mix of traditional and modern board games as well as more action-packed party games.

Even in the public lobby, you can easily pass the time, but the stylishly designed game rooms, which were created to match the themes of the individual games, also show the developers' attention to detail.

Although the game was released around two years ago, new content is still being added. The developers are also constantly trying to improve the gaming experience and just yesterday released an update with changes requested by the community (Vignette/Smooth Turn, etc.).

Therefore, I would definitely recommend purchasing this product.

If I've piqued your interest, I hope to see you soon at ‘Table Party’ :-)

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for taking the time to write such a thoughtful and detailed review — we truly appreciate it!

We’re thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the variety of games, the themed rooms, and the atmosphere in the public lobby. Your kind words about our attention to detail and ongoing updates really mean a lot to the whole team.

We're committed to continuously improving the experience, and it's great to know that recent updates like Smooth Turn and Vignette were helpful.

To celebrate the winter season, we've added a Christmas-themed room and a snow-covered garden in the lobby — perfect for cozy holiday vibes! ❄️🎄
Currently, five DLCs are available, and we’re excited to share that a brand-new DLC game is coming soon. Stay tuned!

Thanks again for being part of the party! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_title: VR board games at the best
reviews.review_description: I'm a really big fan of board games but pretty new into VR. The combination of these too is an excellent idea! Too bad none of my friends have VR so I could beat them. I haven't found any public rooms yet, but with AI it is pretty fun too. Sometimes it beats me also. I will for sure play a lot more! Can't wait!

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for the amazing review — we’re so happy to welcome a fellow board game fan into the world of VR!

We totally get the pain of having no friends to beat (yet!) — but glad to hear the AI is keeping you on your toes 😄
We’re also working on improving ways to find public matches and connect with other players, so stay tuned!

Hope you have many more great rounds ahead.
See you again at the (virtual) table! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_title: Great interface and easy to use
reviews.review_description:
This is a cute little game once u get into it. I had trouble as it doesn’t allow the game to open if you don’t allow mic access. The support were great, recognising and giving the solution quickly. 

There are a good choice of gams and the room your in is pretty cool! As I’m from the UK I don’t really recognise some of the game (maybe we just call them something different). I played beer pong, slots and wack a mole so far and all great fun but wanted to write my early first impressions.

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for sharing your first impressions — we’re so glad you’re enjoying it so far!

About the mic access issue — that was actually a system-level requirement from the Meta Store, and we’re really glad to hear it got resolved quickly with the help of support! 😊

We really appreciate you trying out games like Beer Pong, Slots, and Whack-a-Mole — and we love hearing perspectives from players in the UK! You're right — some games may go by different names depending on region, and we're always thinking of ways to make things more familiar and accessible for everyone.

Thanks again for jumping into the party — we can’t wait to hear what you think as you explore more! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description: I got this from FB GA. It's amazing that everything is ready to party even from the lobby. The built-in games are long enough to play and there are plenty of additional DLCs. The instructions for each game are also provided faithfully and I can practice by myself. The developer's efforts for various user convenience stand out. I've tried a few things yet, but the interaction works intuitively without any errors. I like to have fun with my family of three, and I hope whack-a-moles and go-stop can be more-than-3 multi-player as well.

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for the kind and thoughtful review — we’re so glad you’re enjoying the experience, from the lobby to the games themselves!

It’s great to hear that you’ve been playing with your family — that’s exactly the kind of joyful, shared experience we hoped to create. 😊
We also really appreciate your suggestion about supporting more-than-3 multiplayer in games like Whack-a-Mole and Go-Stop. We’ll definitely take a closer look at this as we continue to expand gameplay options.

Thanks again for noticing the little details — your feedback means a lot to our team!
See you at the (virtual) table! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description: Since the shut down on Dec 1 & 2 for repairs this game has failed to load, i have re installed every day since and it just boots me out...time for refund

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
We’re very sorry for the inconvenience you’ve experienced.

Based on the symptoms you described, it seems likely that this may be related to your headset’s memory issue.
If you could reach out to us via our official Discord server, we’d be happy to assist you directly and do our best to help resolve the problem.

Thank you for your patience — we’re here to help!
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description: Really awesome game especially if you have friends and family far apart or if you just aren’t able to get out as much for whatever reason. I get to hangout with the people I love that are miles away and have game night. You can also meet new ppl and play with them. Really cool game. For the price it’s a no brainer.

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for the heartfelt review — this is exactly why we made Table Party.

We love that you're able to enjoy game night with loved ones, no matter the distance. Creating moments of connection like that is what it's all about 💛
And yes — meeting new people and sharing laughter across the globe is one of the most magical parts of social VR!

Thanks again for being part of the party. See you at the (virtual) table! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_title: Best Board Game Collection in VR
reviews.review_description: This is a really well-made board game simulation. The graphics are excellent, and there’s a wide variety of games beyond the classic board games. The 3D Tetris has been my favorite so far. The controls feel snappy and intuitive, and there are plenty of different game rooms to keep the experience fresh. It’s a great game to hang out with friends and have a good time. My only wish is that there were more players in the lobby.

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for the great review — we’re so happy to hear you’re enjoying the variety, the visuals, and especially 3D Tetris (one of our favorites too!).

We’d love for you to check out our Christmas-themed lobby, now updated with festive decorations and snowy fun! 🎄⛄
We also recently added a 30-minute Try Before You Buy (TBYB) option, which is bringing more players into the lobby — so you might run into new friends more often now!

Thanks again for being part of the party — see you at the (virtual) table! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description: Good collection of games with nice variety of them packaged into one. There is something for everyone whether you play solo or with family and friends. I Like hanging out and walking around the lobby where there are more games which is cool. Would be nice if the dev can implement hand tracking as some games can use it. Other than that the game is great, highly recommended

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for the awesome review and kind words — we’re so glad you’re enjoying the wide variety of games and the fun lobby experience!

We totally agree — hand tracking would be a great addition, and the good news is: we’re actively working on it! Some games are already being tested internally with hand-tracking support, so stay tuned 👀

Thanks again for the encouragement. Your feedback really helps us keep improving.
See you at the virtual table! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_title: Amazing fun pack of social VR games
reviews.review_description:
Fun game by a Korean dev with tons of variety. DLCs are tempting, but even the free stuff is solid. The new Tetris update? Mind-blowing. Flashy effects + beautiful VR graphics = pure fun.

Perfect for social gaming—chill vibes, dumb jokes with friends, and lots of laughs. Could be even better with more fun dares: loser sings in the echo mic, winner picks the next game, or even a silly “bald avatar for a week” challenge. 😂

Dev team keeps adding new games and actually listens to feedback, which is amazing. Future looks super bright for this one. Strongly recommend!

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for the amazing review — we’re beyond happy to hear you’re having such a great time!

We’re especially thrilled that you enjoyed the Tetris update — our team had so much fun adding those flashy effects! 😊
Your challenge ideas are gold — “loser sings in echo mic” and “bald avatar for a week”? 😂 We absolutely love it. We’ll definitely keep these in mind as we explore new ways to add more party-style chaos and fun dares.

Ah! So that’s why we’ve been seeing players with some… very special looks in the lobby lately! 😆
We really appreciate your support and thoughtful feedback. More games and features are on the way — and we’ll keep listening closely.

See you (and your friends) at the virtual table! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description:
One of the best parts of Table Party is just hanging out in the lobby with other players. The Community Room feels like a real virtual party space — you can play mini-games, take fun photos, throw darts, or even mess around with props together. It’s more than just waiting for a match — it’s a whole experience on its own.

I’ve had some of the most fun moments in VR just chatting and laughing with people in the lobby before starting a game. It really brings back the feeling of game nights with friends, but in a virtual space.

If you're looking for a fun, casual, and social VR game, Table Party nails it. Highly recommend it if you enjoy multiplayer VR with a great vibe!

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for the awesome review — you captured the exact feeling we hoped to create with our Community Room!

We love that you’re enjoying the lobby not just as a waiting area, but as a real social playground — filled with laughs, photos, and unforgettable moments. VR game nights with friends, anywhere in the world — that’s the dream!

Also, don’t miss our holiday update, with a festive lobby makeover and a snowy garden to enjoy together ❄️🎄
Thanks again for being part of the party — see you at the (virtual) table! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description:
I'm not super into social multiplayer games but I was gifted this to try out and I found it really enjoyable. 

The lobby room looks nice, nicely lit and I loved walking around grabbing board games off the shelves and putting them on tables! 

First thing I did was walk up to the darts table - I've experienced VR darts in Horizon Worlds, in Pinball FX, and some standalone darts game so I can say the throwing feels perfect in this. 

Everything just feels 'right' theres no jankiness - this app just feels like its been carefully crafted to make all the things feel 'nice' and I appreciate that.

I went over to a table and at first thought it was air hocky but it was beer pong. I threw a couple of shots and it felt good. I want more things in there though like table tennis, ice hockey, pool - but whats there at the moment feels good. There's other stuff to do like take selfies, pour drinks, play music,  use a slot machine and win prizes - I got a balloon which was fun to play with and then I let it go and it floated up and popped

One of the devs joined and he showed me rooms, and they look really nice! There was a nice touch like a painting on the wall with a bird and it animated and flew off - stuff like that is magical in VR and I feel like a lot of multiplayer social experience type games try too hard to mimick reality and forget VR can do cooler things. 

The UI is nice - easy to understand and intuitive - the music was a bit loud and I had no trouble quickly going to settings and lowering the music volume. 

Like walk about minigolf, the DLC can be shared - not everyone needs to own it - I got to play the log chopping game by joining the devs part and it was really fun! Its a bit like jenga but with a tree. Easy to learn, hard to master. I've bought that now to practise

Bit pricey though... I wonder if they could make a free version with limited features because convincing all your mates to buy it might be hard... or pick up in a sale.

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for the thoughtful and detailed review — your words truly made our day!

We're thrilled that you enjoyed the little immersive touches, from the animated painting to the satisfying dart mechanics, and that you appreciated the overall polish of the experience. We completely agree — VR can do more than just replicate reality, and we love creating those magical little surprises!

By the way — our Christmas-themed update is now live, with a festive lobby and snowy garden to explore ❄️🎄
And right now, Table Party is on sale, and we’ve also added a 30-minute “Try Before You Buy” demo so your friends can experience the fun before committing! We’d love for you to spread the word and bring more party guests to the virtual table!

Thanks again for being part of the party 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_title: VR Game Recommendation for Social Gather
reviews.review_description:
This VR game is perfect for entertaining guests! Its intuitive controls make it feel as natural as playing a board game in real life, allowing even first-time VR users to adapt quickly. With a motion sickness-free movement system and the ability to play comfortably while seated, it's ideal for both VR novices and experienced players to enjoy together.
The game boasts a fantastic variety of options, from globally renowned board games to traditional Asian folk games, offering excellent content volume. For users who might feel pressured by competitive multiplayer, the option to play solo is also a great plus.
I have one suggestion: for those who prefer solo play, it would be wonderful if there were interactive AI opponents. Imagine being able to converse with the AI while playing—much like the real-time voice interactions seen in many modern apps utilizing AI. This would significantly enhance the solo experience!

developer_response.body:
Hello. This is Table Party Creator, Sunny.
Thank you so much for the wonderful review!

We’re thrilled to hear that Table Party has been a fun and welcoming experience for both VR newcomers and seasoned players alike. It’s great to know you appreciated the intuitive gameplay, comfortable seated experience, and the wide variety of game options—including both global board game hits and traditional Asian folk games.

Your suggestion about adding interactive AI opponents is truly insightful! We completely agree that voice-interactive AI could make solo play even more immersive, and it's something we’re very excited to explore as we continue developing Table Party.

Thanks for sticking around and being part of the party — see you at the (virtual) table! 🥳
— The Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description:
More Than Just Digital Board Games — It’s a VR Spectacle! ✨

Table Party doesn’t just digitize bㅡoard games — it reimagines them in the most magical way possible. From the vivid animations to the immersive environments, every game feels like you're stepping into a living, breathing world designed for fun.

The attention to detail is incredible. Dice don’t just roll — they bounce with weight. Cards don’t just flip — they snap with flair. Each mini-game has its own atmosphere and charm, and it genuinely makes you feel like you’re inside an animated board game universe.

This isn’t just a VR port of traditional games — it’s a celebration of play, imagination, and immersion. If you’re looking for a VR experience that brings board games to life like never before, Table Party is absolutely worth it!

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for your incredibly kind and thoughtful review — your words truly warmed our hearts!

We're so happy to hear that the animations, environments, and little details brought the magic of board games to life for you. That sense of immersion and joy is exactly what we set out to create!

We’ve recently added a festive Christmas update, complete with a cozy holiday-themed lobby and a snowy garden ❄️🎄 — we hope you’ll check it out and continue enjoying the wonder of Table Party this season.

Thanks again for being part of the party — and for celebrating the joy of play with us! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_title: The best game everyone can play together
reviews.review_description:
Great Value for the Price — So Much to Do! 💸🎲

Table Party offers an incredible amount of content for a very reasonable price. Not only do you get access to a wide variety of board games, but there's also a fun and interactive lobby where you can enjoy mini-games like darts, beer pong, slot machines, and more.

It feels more like a full social experience than just a collection of games. Whether you're playing with friends or just hanging out in the lobby, there's always something to do.

If you’re looking for a feature-packed VR game that doesn’t break the bank, Table Party is a fantastic choice. Totally worth it!

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for the amazing review — your kind words truly mean a lot to us!

We're so happy to hear that you're enjoying not just the variety of games, but also the full social experience in the lobby. That's exactly what we aimed to create — a space where there’s always something fun to do, whether you're with friends or just relaxing solo.

If you haven’t already, be sure to check out our Christmas update, featuring a festive lobby and snowy garden ❄️🎄
Thanks again for the wonderful recommendation — we’re so glad to have you at the (virtual) table! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description: As a content created, I love games like this because I have so much fun. I would definitely play this again and it’s worth buying very family-friendly game.

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Table Party Creator, Sunny.
Thank you so much for the wonderful praise!

We’re thrilled to hear that you had so much fun with Table Party! It’s amazing to know that our game resonates with content creators like you, and we truly appreciate your support. We’ll keep working hard to bring even more fun and family-friendly experiences your way.

Thanks for being part of the party — we can’t wait to see you again at the (virtual) table! 🥳
— The Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description: Paid for this game and have yet to get to play it. Simply will not load.

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party.
We're so sorry to hear that you're having trouble launching the game — that’s definitely not the experience we want for our players.

We’ve sent you a message to help identify and resolve the issue as quickly as possible.
Thank you for your patience, and we’ll do our best to get you playing soon!

— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description: Table party is a fun game with an assortment of fun board games for the whole family.  You can play with friends or family or by yourself the choice is ultimately yours .the graphics are great the visuals are superb.  I like that you can buy add ons if you choose you can join a room with up to 4 players. You can create a party or use a quick match ultimately the choice is yours there are so many possibilities when playing your sure to have fun . All in all I recommend this game to everyone.

developer_response.body:
Hello. This is Table Party Creator, Sunny.
Thank you so much for the kind words and recommendation!

We’re so glad you’re enjoying the variety of board games and the flexibility to play however you like—whether it’s solo, with friends, or with family. It means a lot to hear you appreciate the graphics, multiplayer options, and the ability to customize your experience with add-ons.

Your support helps us keep building the ultimate VR game night for everyone.
Thanks for being part of the party — see you at the (virtual) table! 🥳
— The Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description: This app was a delightful surprise. It has several card games and party games. Something for everyone. I was lucky enough to go in and meet the cider/creator (head of her team) who was nice enough to show me how to okay the newest game. I would recommend this game to all ages.

developer_response.body:
Hello Phrajil, It was my best time to meet you at the Table Party.
I usually play Table Party, meet our players, and teaching how to play&enjoy our Table Party.
Me and our devs love our Table Party, and our Players(Table Party Mates!)

Thanks for your warm review and recommend💕
I look forward to meeting you again by chance!😉

reviews.review_title: I need to update your app preview video
reviews.review_description: This is a great game great for family and friends fun but if most people see the preview app, they would shy away from it. It looks cheesy, but the game, outstanding!

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for your honest and helpful feedback!

We totally hear you about the app preview — and we really appreciate you looking past it to discover the fun inside. We're continuously updating the game, and many new features, games, and improvements have been added since launch.

Have you checked out our Christmas update yet? The festive lobby and snowy garden have been a hit with players! 🎄❄️
If you’re enjoying Table Party, we’d love it if you could recommend it to your friends — the more, the merrier at the virtual table!

Thanks again for being part of the party 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description:
Wow this is amazing it's what VR was made for to take you on a journey. And this app transforms you to a different place and time.

The devs have put a lot of hard work into making a outstanding experience.
The way this game plays is truly a completely different experience to anything I have played in VR.
I have just played rummy against a really good AI and got completely lost with time playing chess.

I stumbled across this app looking for table top games and I'm extremely pleased that I  bought this fantastic app. 
The rooms are stunning and the layout of the app is excellent.

I'm looking forward to seeing what the devs come up with next for this in my opinion an award winning game for quest.

Top marks devs 10 out of 10 please keep up the great work you are doing with this amazing quality app.
Hopefully new updates will bring some more outstanding experiences.

Thank you devs

developer_response.body:
Hello. This is Table Party Creator, Sunny.
Thank you for the great review Darren!❤️ Your warm support gives cheer us up.
We are planning update lobby this month. And next month, a new DLC will be added - a new licensed board game!
Join our community and get the latest news and event information on our official Discord server. https://discord.com/invite/A3GvvMPDKg

reviews.review_title: Fantastic alone or with friends & family
reviews.review_description:
Table Party offers a wide range of things to play from traditional games like Chess or Othello/Reversi to more modern activities like Whack-a-mole or catch the ghost.

There's well over a dozen games and all work incredibly well. It's easy to create a party and invite friends or just start a game and you'll get an AI opponent.

There's also various environments and activities to enjoy and the developers are adding new content regularly. 

Really impressed and can't wait to see what other games get added.

developer_response.body:
Hi LeeHubbz,

Wow — thank you so much for the thoughtful and encouraging review! 😊
We’re thrilled to hear that you’re enjoying Table Party both solo and with friends & family. It means a lot to know that the variety of games and ease of play are hitting the mark for you.

We're constantly working on new content and improvements, and your kind words give our team a real boost. Can’t wait to show you what’s coming next — we’ve got some exciting things on the way!

Thanks again for being part of the party 🥳
— The Table Party Team

reviews.review_title: Can't play anything have 2 locks closed
reviews.review_description: Not working can't play

developer_response.body:
Hello, I'm so sorry for the temporary inconvenience.
When I check this review, I enter the Table Party and met you at the table party.
I promised to fix the problem, and I got a message that the problem was fixed :)
The two locks are the ability to add friends and the inventory function that are scheduled for update.

I hope you have a great time playing the table party!
Have fun our mate!

reviews.review_description:
I’ve played my fair share of board game apps, but Table Party is hands down the best. It’s amazing how lifelike and immersive board games can feel in VR. The graphics are clean and polished, and being mindful of details like rolling dice or moving pieces makes every action surprisingly satisfying.

The variety of games is fantastic, offering everything from classic strategy games to fun, lighthearted mini-games. Whether you’re in the mood for something competitive or casual, there’s always something to enjoy. Plus, with avatar customization and global leaderboards, there’s a nice extra layer of fun and competition.

If you’re looking for a fresh and exciting way to experience board games with friends, this is it. The developers promise even more games in future updates, so I’m definitely sticking around. Highly recommended for board game fans!

developer_response.body:
Hi monet9812,

Your review truly made our day — thank you! 🥹🎲
It’s incredibly rewarding to hear that Table Party has become your favorite board game app, and that the little details like dice rolls and piece movement are adding to the immersion. We care deeply about those tactile touches, so it means a lot that you noticed.

We’re also glad you’re enjoying the game variety and the competitive layers like leaderboards and avatars. And yes — more games and features are already in the works, so we’re excited to keep surprising you!

Thanks for sticking around and being part of the party — see you at the (virtual) table! 🥳
— The Table Party Team🎲

reviews.review_title: Happy Holidays with the Table Party!
reviews.review_description: I thought it was a game with a variety of tabletop board games only, but there are some games that you can't experience in real life board games somthing like archery and stacking items.

developer_response.body:
Hi nohch,

Thank you so much for your kind review — and Happy Holidays to you too! 🎄
We're thrilled to hear that Table Party brought some festive fun to your holidays.
Indeed, while we love classic board games, we're also excited to explore the kind of playful experiences only possible in VR — like archery and those gravity-defying stacking challenges!

We’ll keep working to bring even more surprising and joyful moments to the party.
Hope to see you again in the game soon!

Warm wishes,
— The Table Party Team 🥳

reviews.review_description:
This game is great! I enjoy playing it with friends and family. I like it because we can talk and catch up while playing. We have some great laughs! 

The environments are neat, and you can pick one you like. The items in the environments are stationary but look cool. There are several multiplayer games- some familiar and some I've never heard of. The mechanics work pretty well. We haven't experienced any issues while playing. 

I look forward to possibly more addition of new games! A great time for young and old.

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for the kind and thoughtful review — we’re so happy to hear that you’re enjoying fun game nights with friends and family!

It means a lot to know that the environments, game variety, and smooth mechanics are helping you create great moments and laughter. 😊
We’re also happy to share that more new games are on the way, including exciting DLCs and content updates — so stay tuned!

Thanks again for being part of the party — for both the young and the young-at-heart! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description: I got this at 50% off. I think that was worth it,  but the $24.99 is too high for such an app.

developer_response.body:
Hi Angela,

Thank you for sharing your thoughts!
We’re really glad you found the game fun and felt the 50% discount made it worthwhile 😊

We totally understand your point about pricing. Table Party is an ongoing project where we're continuously adding new games, features, and social experiences — and your feedback helps us find the right balance between value and accessibility.

We hope to keep improving and surprising you with more content that feels worth every penny. Thanks again for playing and being part of the party!

Best wishes,
— The Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description:
There's multiple games you can choose from, so this is NOT an app you'll get board of in an hour.   Had a lot of laughs playing with friends - I definitely recommend this one!

🎲♟️🏹

If you're a board game fan, you definitely want to give this game a try!

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲♟️
Thank you so much for the fun and energetic review — it truly made us smile! 😊

We’re so glad you had a great time laughing with friends, and we love that the variety of games kept things exciting.
Thanks for the recommendation — and for being part of the party!

See you again at the (virtual) table! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description: I love this app, it has several games and is very social, with rooms to be together in a relaxed and fun environment. Very easy to use! I hope they expand to more games soon!

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for the lovely review — we're so glad you're enjoying the games and the social atmosphere!

We hope you also check out our Christmas-themed update, featuring a festive lobby and snowy garden — perfect for relaxing and celebrating with friends this season! 🎄❄️
And yes — more new games are definitely on the way, so stay tuned!

Thanks again for being part of the party 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_description: All the fun of game night with your friends, without leaving the comfort of your vr headset. Table Party has a ton of table top, and mini games!

reviews.review_description:
This game is so great. The best game that needs no more words. A must-play game for anyone who owns MetaQuest! I highly recommend that buy this game and try it. 
I love you guys!

reviews.review_description: This is exactly what we need. There was a similar game a year ago from a different developer but that got fully abandoned. Please keep developing for this as it is already my favourite game. Lots and lots of potential for more and already great options now

developer_response.body:
Hello! This is Sunny from Table Party 🎲
Thank you so much for your kind words — it means the world to us to hear that Table Party has become your favorite game!

We truly believe in the long-term vision of this platform, and we’re committed to growing it with care and consistency. Your encouragement gives us even more motivation to keep going strong.

We’ve just launched our Christmas update, featuring a cozy snowy garden and a beautifully decorated holiday tree lobby ❄️🎄 — perfect for celebrating with friends and family.
And we’re excited to announce the release of a brand-new DLC: Mahé — a super fun and unpredictable turtle racing board game you can now enjoy in VR! 🐢

Thank you again for being part of the party — we’re just getting started! 🥳
— Sunny & the Table Party Team 🎲

reviews.review_title: Great game - reminiscent of DIVE VR
reviews.review_description:
There is far more good in this game than not.  Finally, some decent board and card games for those nights when you just want to chill out and play.  And for a bit more body movement, the stacking game is by far my favorite and the arrows game gives a decent upper arm workout.  And I was so appreciative for the in-game button height adjustment - made things simple.

Now for improvements:

At this time, we cannot play with only friends.  We are automatched with other players publicly.  We did manage to get together and play as a group of 3, but it was by chance... not by choice.  There are no private rooms yet.  I hope private rooms are in the pipeline.

I think the tutorial was a bit long and wished it was optional.  In fact, I would have preferred that the individual games each had their own practice or optional tutorial mode rather than how to use the menus and change my avatar.

I was also disappointed to see that this game does not app share.  Applab games don't have to, but many do as a great convenience and savings for the community... so in order to play this with my partner, we were required to purchase a second copy of the game.  For the price, this is a great family game to share but it is a bit too high in price if it doesn't share.

Either way, there is nothing else quite like it in VR and I hope they continue to add more content so that paying 2X for it stings a bit less.

Hello all! This review comes to you from the perspective of a senior citizen. I find this game to be quite fun as many of the games are ones that I grew up with and played with family and friends. Over half of these games are derived from games you already know. One card=Uno, Yacht dice=Yahtzee  and more. The many games consist of Board games, Dice games, Dominos, Chess and Checkers. 
Some arcade is thrown in for the younger ones, like whack a mole. This game is a value to me as you can find similar games like these sold separately for about the same price as this one is as a whole collection. It's got something for the whole family. I feel like a kid again when I play with family and friends. I got copies for my grown kids and now for a couple of hours, a few times a week it doesn't feel like they live so far away anymore.  💕 This gets it to the top of my list of most used games for that reason. If you need a playing partner, no problem as it has well playing AI partners. I tried to find a way to invite someone to the game, but the developer took care of that. Your extra players are automatically connected when they choose the same game as you. What we did to make that process easier was to invite your party to your Meta "suite" so you could speak to each other first. Then all of you open the game and make your game selection from the menu. There you go! You automatically appear in the same games. I'd like to suggest a room code to make things easier for the first time players. Sorry for the long review but this game has inspired me. Go get it it's a big thumbs up for me 👍

"Table Party" has redefined how I enjoy board games! 
The VR experience adds a whole new level of excitement to classics like Chess and Rummy. The multiplayer feature allows me to connect with friends for an engaging and laughter-filled gaming night, no matter where they are. The attention to detail in the virtual environment and the easy-to-use controls make 'Table Party' a must-try for both board game aficionados and VR enthusiasts. It's the perfect marriage of traditional and modern gaming, creating moments that linger long after the game is over.

reviews.review_title: A very fun game for passing the time
reviews.review_description: I've very much enjoyed my time with the selection of board games available, and find it to be a really cool alternative to the real thing. I did find it difficult to find other players sometimes and could only play with AI, but as the game releases in fun, attracts more players and introduces even more games it would be an absolute blast.

Great tabletop game for vr begineers or vr enthusiasts alike. The developers have done a great job of teaching the users how to play and this will be a game that i recommend to friends and family and new owners to the quest

Absolutely loving my experience with 'Table Party'! The seamless integration of classic board games into the VR realm is a game-changer. The multiplayer feature makes game nights with friends a blast, and the intuitive controls enhance the overall enjoyment. From immersive gameplay to the vibrant virtual world, 'Table Party' has turned my gaming sessions into unforgettable adventures. Highly recommend to fellow board game enthusiasts and VR fans alike – it's a perfect blend of nostalgia and cutting-edge tech.

UPDATE: It's been more than a week, and is still broken.

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you for purchasing our game.

I'm so sorry for your waiting:)

reviews.review_description:
I LOVE board games, this has 10 at the moment, looking forward to more coming.
As it is very, very new, so there aren’t many people, please come join me, the more the merrier. You can choose to play with an AI player though, so can play til more people join.
If I could recommend some games to be added, they would be Backgammon, Monopoly (lots of people are looking for this) & Cluedo, these would be amazing !
Thank you !

reviews.review_title: The Best VR Board Game for a Fun
reviews.review_description:
Table Party is a virtual reality board game that allows you to play with friends and family from all over the world. With a wide variety of games to choose from, you're sure to find something that everyone will enjoy.

The UI in Table Party are some of the best I've ever seen in a VR game. The boards are neatly rendered, and the pieces are lifelike. The sound effects are also good, and really help to immerse you in the game.

The gameplay in Table Party is smooth and easy to learn. Even if you're new to VR, you'll be up and running in no time. The controls are intuitive, and the game is well-balanced.

Overall, Table Party is an excellent VR board game. It's fun, easy to learn, and has a wide variety of games to choose from. I highly recommend it to anyone who loves board games or VR.

Here are some of the things I love about Table Party:

The gameplay is smooth and easy to learn.

The game has a wide variety of games to choose from.

It's a great way to connect with friends and family from all over the world.

If you're looking for a fun and immersive VR board game, I highly recommend Table Party. It's sure to provide hours of entertainment for you and your friends.

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you for your sincere review :)
Table Party is a more fun game when played together.
More diverse content will be added in the future, so please enjoy the game for longer.
Have fun!

reviews.review_description:
A problem carried over from dive VR that has never seemed to be a problem in any other game is the inability to sit straight at the table. No matter how you teleport or turn, you are always just off kilter. It's technically a minor failure, but shows a way of designing that never quite works.

There are games that are locked with no explanation, as to whether they are unfinished, or for later purchase, and the tutorial is phenomenally awkward. Every time you try to follow instructions, you either have to wait for the cutesy instructor to finish, or it interrupts you while trying to follow instructions.

It just doesn't seem worth the large cost

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you for purchasing our game :)
What is the meaning "inability to sit straight at the table"?
We designed it to ensure that all players are properly positioned at the gaming table once the game starts.
If possible, could you please send me a capture message regarding the issue?
Thank you for your interest and time.

reviews.review_description: This game is okay. It's kind of boring, though. It seems like I can't find anybody to play with, but with the boring AI, no kind of motion, nothing just sitting there and look stupid. The games are okay. Some glitches.

developer_response.body:
hello! Thank you for purchasing our game :)
I'm glad the games are fun!
Table party is more fun if you play together in multiplayer.
How about finding a party member to play with on our Discord? https://discord.com/invite/A3GvvMPDKg
We hope you have a good time in our Table Party:)
Have fun!

reviews.review_description: The game has lots of potential, with various types of games to play such as Yahtzee, Chess and Othello. I think about 10 games or so at the moment to play against AI or ‘real players’ and I am sure more games will be added.  The graphics are clean BUT I would ask the dev’s to look at giving the AI some movement as they have no interaction and that’s surely what VR is about.  For me with the AI not even blinking, moving their pieces it was quite uninspiring. I just need to meet real time players to pit my wits against.  I hope the devs read comments and keep updating this game.

reviews.review_title: Since update  I can’t get in the app
reviews.review_description: Since the Oculus update we can’t get into the game. States network error. I paid good money for this game

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you for purchasing our game.
Finally the issue resolved and now you can enjoy Table Party.
I'm so sorry for your waiting:)
We're hope you have fun in Table Party.

reviews.review_description:
Hi,
I purchased this game in the hope it will give me a relaxing, fun, social experience with friends.. when we just want to chill.
I was very impressed!
Graphics are nice and clean, controls great,  sounds nice and relaxing and suitable, environments very nice too.
There’s 13 games… they vary from 1-4 players. Dice games, archery game, whack a mole, othello, rummy,  ect…

There’s a global score board, and avatar creator too.

This is still in development, but we didn’t encounter any bugs or glitches at all.

The developer mentions that they will be adding licensed games to the collection in the future.

A very well done and put together game.
Highly recommended!

I had a fantastic time playing this game with my friends. It provided a delightful and stress-free experience.

Among the various games available, I found the yacht dice, whack-a-mole, and arrow shooting games to be particularly enjoyable. I was also fascinated by the inclusion of the traditional Korean game, 'Yutnori.'

There is one aspect that I would like to see improved. It would be great to have the option to skip the tutorial or start directly from the menu.

Overall, this VR game is perfect for casual and enjoyable play. It provided us with a satisfying time, and I highly recommend it to others.

Just had the craziest time with 'Table Party' and had to share! Meet up with my crew in VR, and let me tell you, it's like hanging out for real. Playing our favorite board game together virtually was mind-blowing – it's like we were in the same room, laughing, strategizing, just vibing. 'Table Party' turned our regular game night into a wild, virtual party. If you're into board games and want to level up your social gaming, this is where it's at!"

Finally a games  compendium!!! 

If you are looking to play board games in VR, download Table Party right now!  It’s a really nice environment, you won’t be disappointed! 

The lobby (Private Room) looks a little bland for now, but I hear it’s getting a makeover in the near future! But once in the games rooms omg fantastic little environments! 

You can enjoy a variety of content in a wonderful virtual space with everyone, friends or random opponents! 🎲 you can click AI if your just wanting some alone time or to even just learn the rules of the game! Or as said you can join and be matched with an online player! That said soon private rooms whereby you can join via room code will be added in the near future! 

Enjoy 10 board games and 3 casual games in a fantastic virtual world with the cool look I imagined! 

You can make friends with people from all over the world and hang out in a cool virtual games world. It’s pretty neat. 

Also, more games and content will be added, I saw currently only two games are locked 🔒 as they are in development still soon to be released! 

Features: Single player  / Multiplayer modes.

You can also customize your avatar in your own private room. 

10 types of board games: One card, Yacht Dice, Othello, Chess, Checkers, Rummy, Gin Rummy, Yut Nori, Omok, Janggi 3 types of causal games : Stack Up, Flying Arrow, Whack a Mole 🔥And many more on the way 🙌

Way more games coming for this so the price tag is so worth it you can have hours of fun in this app! 

Grab it now you won’t be dissatisfied 😉
